title: Late binding bites
prompt:
Read the snippet. Predict its exact stdout. (Watch the lambdas - and remember
what `or` / `and` actually return in Python.)
snippet:
funcs = []
for i in range(3):
    funcs.append(lambda: i * 10)
print([f() for f in funcs])

x = 0
print(x or "fallback")
print(x and "value")
